![evolutionQ_logo_blue-1](https://frequency.evolutionq.com/hubfs/evolutionQ_logo_blue-1.png)
## The Quantum-Safe Journey
#### Understanding the quantum threat and post quantum cryptography (PQC) migration methods
Quantum computing is evolving rapidly, unlocking powerful new capabilities — and introducing serious new threat vectors for businesses to prepare against. In this session, we'll explore the current state of quantum computing, the risks it poses to today's cryptographic systems, and the timeline for when these threats could become reality. We'll also dive into emerging quantum-safe technologies, evolving standards, and the practical steps organizations are taking right now to future-proof their security in a post-quantum world.
In this webinar you will learn:
  * What it means to be quantum safe
  * Why you need to start your journey now
  * How to ensure your organization takes the right steps


### Watch the on-demand webinar now
First Name
Last Name
Company Name
Email*
  * I agree to receive news and updates from evolutionQ.**


## Our expert presenters
### Brian Neill, VP, Services
Brian Neill brings over 25 years of experience in the security and cryptography industry with industry leaders from Certicom to Blackberry. During his career, he has delivered state-of-the-art secure communications products to customers in the telecommunications, consumer electronics and embedded software industries. He is also an Associate at the Institute of Quantum Computing at the University of Waterloo. 
![brian-headshot](https://frequency.evolutionq.com/hubfs/brian-headshot.jpg)
### Matt Jaksic, VP, Partnerships
With 20 years of experience at industry leaders from TELUS to Deloitte, Matt Jaksic brings deep expertise in business, technology, and growth strategies to evolutionQ and its partners. During his career, he has acquired initial customers, defined business requirements and managed product portfolios to drive product-market fit and scale organizations in the security, mobile and commerce industries. 
![matt-headshot](https://frequency.evolutionq.com/hubfs/matt-headshot.jpg)
** You own your inbox. 💙 By clicking view now, you acknowledge that you have reviewed our Privacy Policy and we acknowledge that you can unsubscribe at any time with no hard feelings.

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-3 dnd_area-row-1-vertical-alignment dnd-section">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span6 widget-span widget-type-cell cell_1748289204987-vertical-alignment dnd-column" style="" data-widget-type="cell" data-x="0" data-w="6">

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-4 dnd-row">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-custom_widget dnd-module" style="" data-widget-type="custom_widget" data-x="0" data-w="12">
<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1748289204831" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module widget-type-rich_text" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><span id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1748289204831_" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_rich_text" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="rich_text"><h2 style="text-align: left;">The Quantum-Safe Journey</h2>
<h4 style="text-align: left;">Understanding the quantum threat and post quantum cryptography (PQC) migration methods</h4>
<p><span>Quantum computing is evolving rapidly, unlocking powerful new capabilities — and introducing serious new threat vectors for businesses to prepare against. In this session, we'll explore the current state of quantum computing, the risks it poses to today's cryptographic systems, and the timeline for when these threats could become reality. We'll also dive into emerging quantum-safe technologies, evolving standards, and the practical steps organizations are taking right now to future-proof their security in a post-quantum world.</span></p>
<p>In this webinar you will learn:</p>
<ul>
<li>What it means to be quantum safe</li>
<li>Why you need to start your journey now</li>
<li>How to ensure your organization takes the right steps</li>
</ul></span></div>

</div><!--end widget-span -->
</div><!--end row-->
</div><!--end row-wrapper -->

</div><!--end widget-span -->

<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1748022257801" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module widget-type-rich_text" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><span id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1748022257801_" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_rich_text" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="rich_text"><h2>Our expert presenters</h2>
<h3>Brian Neill, VP, Services</h3>
<p><span aria-hidden="true">Brian Neill brings over 25 years of experience in the security and cryptography industry with industry leaders from Certicom to Blackberry.  During his career, he has delivered state-of-the-art secure communications products to customers in the telecommunications, consumer electronics and embedded software industries. He is also an Associate at the Institute of Quantum Computing at the University of Waterloo. <span> </span></span></p></span></div>

</div><!--end widget-span -->

<p><span aria-hidden="true">With 20 years of experience at industry leaders from TELUS to Deloitte, Matt Jaksic brings deep expertise in business, technology, and growth strategies to evolutionQ and its partners.  During his career, he has acquired initial customers, defined business requirements and managed product portfolios to drive product-market fit and scale organizations in the security, mobile and commerce industries. </span></p></span></div>
